lists.title: Lists
lists.subtitle: Organize and manage your grocery lists
lists.noListsSubtitle: Create your first grocery list to start organizing your shopping

share.title: Share List
share.description: Anyone with this link can join this list. The link expires in 7 days.

lists.sortOrderDescription: How lists are ordered when you open the app
lists.autoArchiveDescription: Automatically hide lists marked as closed

notifications.descriptionGranted: You will be notified when list members make changes.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account
profile.displayNameDescription: Your name shown across the app
profile.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently remove your account and all data

errors.resetFailed: Failed to send reset email. Try again.
errors.photoUploadFailed: Failed to upload photo. Try again.

invite.description: Would you like to join this grocery list? You'll be able to view and edit items together with the other members.
invite.alreadyMember: Already a member? Go to the list

errors.invalidOrExpired: This invite link is invalid or has expired.
errors.joinFailed: Failed to join the list. Please try again.

landing.heroSubtitle: Create organized shopping lists, collaborate with friends and family in real-time, and never forget an item again. All in one beautiful app.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to organize your shopping and collaborate with loved ones

smartLists.title: Smart Lists
smartLists.description: Create unlimited shopping lists with detailed item specifications including quantities, units, and weights.

collaborate.title: Collaborate in Real-Time
collaborate.description: Invite friends and family to share and collaborate on lists. See updates instantly as they shop.

quickShare.title: Quick Share
quickShare.description: Generate QR codes for instant sharing, or invite via email. Your way, your choice.

itemDetails.title: Item Details
itemDetails.description: Track quantities, units, weights, and more. Perfect for meal planning and budget tracking.

emailSharing.title: Email Sharing
emailSharing.description: Send invitations via email to make it easy for anyone to join your shopping lists.

alwaysSynced.title: Always Synced
alwaysSynced.description: Your lists are always up to date across all your devices. Shop from phone, tablet, or desktop.

step1.title: Create Your List
step1.description: Start by creating a new shopping list. Add items with specific quantities, units, weights, and notes for each product.

step2.title: Invite Collaborators
step2.description: Share your list by generating a QR code, sending an email invite, or inviting directly from the app. Multiple sharing options for maximum flexibility.

step3.title: Shop Together
step3.description: See real-time updates as family or friends add items, check off purchases, and make changes. Stay perfectly coordinated while shopping.

step4.title: Stay Organized
step4.description: Check off items as you buy them, reuse lists for recurring shopping trips, and keep your shopping history for future reference.

landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of users who are already organizing their shopping with iGrocery. Create your first list today—it's completely free!

footer.tagline: Smart shopping lists for families and friends.

welcome.title: Welcome to iGrocery! 🛒
welcome.body: Let's take a quick tour so you can get started right away. You can skip this at any time.

newList.title: Create a New List
newList.body: Tap here to create a new grocery list. Give it a name and start adding items right away.

scanQr.title: Scan a QR Code
scanQr.body: Use this button to scan a QR code shared by a friend and join their list instantly.

navbar.title: Back to Your Lists
navbar.body: Click the iGrocery logo at any time to return to your lists overview.

settings.title: Settings
settings.body: Customize the app's appearance, list sort order, and notification preferences here.

profile.title: Your Profile
profile.body: Manage your display name, profile photo, password, and account from here.

done.title: You're all set!
done.body: That's it! Create your first list and start shopping smarter with iGrocery.
